# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: docker-build-pod
  labels:
    app: ci-cd-builder
    security: restricted
spec:
  serviceAccountName: docker-builder-sa
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 1000
    fsGroup: 1000
    seccompProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault
  containers:
  - name: docker-builder
    image: docker:24-dind
    securityContext:
      allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
      readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
      runAsNonRoot: true
      runAsUser: 1000
      capabilities:
        drop:
        - ALL
    volumeMounts:
    - name: docker-sock
      mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
      readOnly: true
    - name: tmp
      mountPath: /tmp
    - name: docker-cache
      mountPath: /root/.docker
    resources:
      requests:
        memory: "512Mi"
        cpu: "500m"
      limits:
        memory: "2Gi"
        cpu: "2000m"
    env:
    - name: DOCKER_HOST
      value: "unix:///var/run/docker.sock"
  volumes:
  - name: docker-sock
    hostPath:
      path: /var/run/docker.sock
      type: Socket
  - name: tmp
    emptyDir: {}
  - name: docker-cache
    emptyDir: {}
  restartPolicy: Never
  nodeSelector:
    node-role.kubernetes.io/build: "true"
  tolerations:
  - key: "build-workload"
    operator: "Equal"
    value: "true"
    effect: "NoSchedule"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: docker-builder-sa
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: docker-builder-role
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods"]
  verbs: ["get", "list"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: docker-builder-binding
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: docker-builder-sa
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: docker-builder-role
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
